top_signals.title: Cook Stays at Fed But Trump Wins Power Over Other Agencies
top_signals.summary: A closely divided US Supreme Court reinforced the Federal Reserve’s independence from the White House, protecting governors from being fired by the president without proof of wrongdoing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Preston guidance: May 2026
top_signals.summary: Preston factors (earnings and interest factors) are provided for employers.

top_signals.title: Prediction-market operational consolidation could spur M&A wave: Bernstein
top_signals.summary: Bernstein says platforms are bringing exchange, clearing and brokerage infrastructure in-house, setting up potential deals while increasing antitrust and regulatory risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: TGS Gets Exclusive Rights for Seismic Survey Offshore Brunei
top_signals.summary: TGS has secured exclusive rights from the Petroleum Authority of Brunei Darussalam to undertake a multi-client 3D seismic survey offshore Brunei.The contract covers the acquisition, processing and marketing of new 3D seismic data under a multi…
